mapper.sql: id, project_name, project_code, project_type, train_cycle, credit, cost, content, target, limit_major, status, create_user, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO train_project (project_name, project_code, project_type, train_cycle, credit, cost, content, target, limit_major, status, create_user, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{projectName}, #{projectCode}, #{projectType}, #{trainCycle}, #{credit}, #{cost}, #{content}, #{target}, #{limitMajor}, #{status}, #{createUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM train_project WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM train_project WHERE project_code = #{projectCode} LIMIT 1
